working: Three Kanban columns present (Todo, Doing, Done)
Add card functionality works — input + button per column
Card movement implemented via Prev/Next buttons
State reloads correctly on page refresh
Unique card IDs generated with timestamps and random suffixes
Event listeners properly bound (Enter key, button clicks)
Subscriber pattern correctly notifies UI on state changes
No obvious JavaScript errors — all functions defined and called correctly
UI is clean and usable — flexbox layout, readable typography, appropriate spacing
feedback_for_iteration: Artifact meets all 7 required judgement criteria. HTML is valid, 3+ columns present, cards can be added and moved (via Prev/Next buttons), delete works, localStorage persists state across reload, backend API is properly wired and callable, and no JS errors detected. Ready for delivery.
